TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_David_Woodard, title = David_Woodard, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/David_Woodard} }

S.FORM: David James Woodard (Ś§ßŚćę¬∑Ť©ĻŚßÜśĖĮ¬∑šľćŤĺĺŚĺ∑, IPA: /'w äd…Ďňźrd/; ryax sa 6 na byacing tay 4 squ kawas na 1964) squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 4, David Woodard htagan beh sa Santa Barbara, California, Amirika'. hiya ga mqwas biru beh UCSB hopa pqwasan biru ru The New School for Social Research, New York hopa pqwasan biru. 2014 kawas 9 byacing David Woodard ru Sonja Vectomov wal kekong la.

David James Woodard (Ś§ßŚćę¬∑Ť©ĻŚßÜśĖĮ¬∑šľćŤĺĺŚĺ∑, IPA: /'w äd…Ďňźrd/; ryax sa 6 na byacing tay 4 squ kawas na 1964) squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 4, David Woodard htagan beh sa Santa Barbara, California, Amirika'. hiya ga mqwas biru beh UCSB hopa pqwasan biru ru The New School for Social Research, New York hopa pqwasan biru. 2014 kawas 9 byacing David Woodard ru Sonja Vectomov wal kekong la.
